name: BuzzFeed, Inc.
description: BuzzFeed, Inc. is a premier digital media company that delivers news, entertainment, and original content to a global audience. Operating a diverse portfolio of well-known brands, including BuzzFeed, BuzzFeed News, HuffPost, Tasty, and Complex Networks, the company leverages data-driven technology and creative storytelling to engage hundreds of millions of people. BuzzFeed specializes in shareable social content, viral videos, interactive quizzes, and investigative journalism, while offering innovative advertising and brand partnership solutions to global advertisers.
